# CoachFlow

> Multi-tenant WhatsApp coaching platform

## apps/api/src/db/alertRules.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-alertrules-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async listAlertRules(tenantId: string) -> Promise<AlertRule[]>`

#### `async upsertAlertRule(tenantId: string, rule: Partial<AlertRule> & { id?: string }) -> Promise<AlertRule>`

#### `async deleteAlertRule(tenantId: string, id: string) -> Promise<void>`

## apps/api/src/db/analytics.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-analytics-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getCompletionRates(tenantId: string)`

#### `async getStepFunnel(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, since: string)`

#### `async getScoreDistribution(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, since: string)`

#### `async getCohortCompletionRate(tenantId: string, cohortId: string)`

#### `async getCohortScoreDistribution(tenantId: string, cohortId: string)`

#### `async getCohortMemberProgress(tenantId: string, cohortId: string)`

## apps/api/src/db/auditLog.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-auditlog-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async writeAuditLog(entry: AuditEntry) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async getAuditLog(tenantId: string, limit: number = 50) -> Promise<AuditLog[]>`

### Constants

- `AuditEntry`: `interface`

## apps/api/src/db/cohorts.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-cohorts-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async listCohorts(tenantId: string)`

#### `async getCohort(cohortId: string, tenantId: string)`

#### `async createCohort(tenantId: string, name: string, journeyId: string, startsAt: string, endsAt: string)`

#### `async deleteCohort(cohortId: string, tenantId: string)`

#### `async addCohortMembers(cohortId: string, userIds: string[])`

#### `async removeCohortMember(cohortId: string, userId: string)`

#### `async getCohortProgress(cohortId: string, tenantId: string)`

## apps/api/src/db/export.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-export-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getUsersExportData(tenantId: string)`

#### `async getUserExportData(userId: string, tenantId: string)`

## apps/api/src/db/gdpr.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-gdpr-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async eraseUser(userId: string, tenantId: string, actorId: string, actorEmail: string) -> Promise<void>`

Anonymize user PII and delete sensitive conversation data.

#### `async exportUserData(userId: string, tenantId: string) -> Promise<UserDataExport>`

Export all data stored about a user.

## apps/api/src/db/journeyLoader.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-journeyloader-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async listJourneys(tenantId: string, includeDrafts = false) -> Promise<JourneyConfig[]>`

#### `async getJourney(tenantId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<JourneyConfig | null>`

#### `async createJourney(tenantId: string, journeyData: { id: string; title: string; description?: string; estimated_minutes?: number; status?: 'draft' | 'published' }) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async updateJourney(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, journeyData: {
    title?: string;
    description?: string;
    estimated_minutes?: number;
    status?: 'draft' | 'published';
    is_template?: boolean;
    schedule_type?: 'manual' | 'daily' | 'weekly';
    schedule_hour?: number | null;
    schedule_day?: number | null;
  }) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async deleteJourney(tenantId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async getStep(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, stepIndex: number) -> Promise<JourneyStep | null>`

## apps/api/src/db/journeySteps.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-journeysteps-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async createStep(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, stepData: {
    id: string;
    step_index: number;
    mode: CoachingMode;
    title: string;
    opening_message: string;
    min_turns?: number;
    step_guidance?: string;
    scoring_criteria?: string[] | null;
    media_url?: string | null;
    media_type?: 'image' | 'document' | 'audio' | 'video' | null;
  }) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async updateStep(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, stepId: string, stepData: {
    mode?: CoachingMode;
    title?: string;
    opening_message?: string;
    min_turns?: number;
    step_guidance?: string;
    scoring_criteria?: string[] | null;
    media_url?: string | null;
    media_type?: 'image' | 'document' | 'audio' | 'video' | null;
  }) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async deleteStep(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, stepId: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async reorderSteps(tenantId: string, journeyId: string, stepIds: string[]) -> Promise<void>`

## apps/api/src/db/journeyVersions.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-journeyversions-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async snapshotJourney(tenantId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<string>`

Creates a snapshot of a journey and its steps.
Pins it to parent_journey_id, increments version, sets status to 'draft'.

#### `async getActiveVersionForUser(userId: string, journeyId: string, tenantId: string) -> Promise<string>`

Returns the correct journey ID for a user.
If they are pinned to a version, returns that version's ID.

#### `async listJourneyVersions(tenantId: string, journeyId: string)`

Lists all snapshots (versions) of a journey.

#### `async getActiveUserCount(tenantId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<number>`

Returns count of active users currently on the main version of the journey.

## apps/api/src/db/journeys.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-journeys-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async ensureUserJourney(userId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<{ id: string; currentStepIndex: number; status: string }>`

Find or create an active user_journey row for this user + journey.

#### `async advanceUserJourney(userJourneyId: string, nextStepIndex: number) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async completeUserJourney(userJourneyId: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async listTemplates(tenantId: string) -> Promise<JourneyRow[]>`

#### `async cloneJourney(sourceId: string, tenantId: string, title: string) -> Promise<JourneyRow>`

## apps/api/src/db/metrics.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-metrics-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getActiveSessions(tenantId: string, windowMinutes: number = 30) -> Promise<number>`

getActiveSessions(tenantId, windowMinutes) — users with a session updated in the last N minutes.

#### `async getStepDropOff(tenantId: string, journeyId: string)`

getStepDropOff(tenantId, journeyId) — per-step completion counts -> drop-off % array.
Returns array of { stepIndex, reached, dropped, dropRate }.

#### `async getStuckUsers(tenantId: string, thresholdHours: number = 24)`

getStuckUsers(tenantId, thresholdHours) — users whose updated_at on user_journeys is older than N hours and journey is in_progress (active).
Returns array of user IDs + hours idle.

## apps/api/src/db/notifications.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-notifications-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getNotificationConfig(tenantId: string) -> Promise<NotificationConfig | null>`

#### `async getResendApiKey(tenantId: string) -> Promise<string | null>`

#### `async upsertNotificationConfig(tenantId: string, config: Partial<NotificationConfig>) -> Promise<NotificationConfig>`

## apps/api/src/db/reminders.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-reminders-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getIdleUsers(tenantId: string, idleHours: number = 48, reminderCooldownHours: number = 24)`

Find users for a tenant who:
1. Have an active journey (current_journey_id IS NOT NULL).
2. Have not sent any messages in the last `idleHours`.
3. Have not received a reminder in the last `reminderCooldownHours`.

#### `async logReminder(tenantId: string, userId: string, type: string = 'nudge')`

Log a reminder send event.

## apps/api/src/db/scheduler.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-scheduler-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getScheduledJourneys(tenantId: string) -> Promise<JourneyRow[]>`

#### `async getEnrolledUsers(tenantId: string, journeyId: string)`

#### `async hasDeliveredToday(tenantId: string, userId: string, journeyId: string, stepIndex: number, scheduleType: 'daily' | 'weekly') -> Promise<boolean>`

#### `async logDelivery(tenantId: string, userId: string, journeyId: string, stepIndex: number) -> Promise<void>`

## apps/api/src/db/scores.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-scores-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async saveScore(params: {
  userId: string;
  sessionId: string;
  journeyId: string;
  stepId: string;
  score: AIScore;
}) -> Promise<void>`

Persist the evaluation result of an assessment step.

#### `async getScoresForUser(userId: string, journeyId: string)`

Retrieve all scores for a given user, newest first.

#### `async getLatestScoreForStep(userId: string, journeyId: string, stepId: string) -> Promise<number | null>`

Retrieve the latest score for a specific user, journey, and step.

## apps/api/src/db/sessions.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-sessions-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async startSession(params: {
  userId: string;
  journeyId: string;
  stepId: string;
  mode: CoachingMode;
}) -> Promise<string>`

Start a new session row and return its id.

#### `async endSession(sessionId: string, summary: string) -> Promise<void>`

End a session with an optional summary.

#### `async logMessage(params: {
  sessionId: string;
  userId: string;
  whatsappMessageId?: string;
  role: 'user' | 'assistant';
  content: string;
}) -> Promise<void>`

Append a message to the conversation log for a session.

#### `async getSessionMessages(sessionId: string)`

#### `async getLatestActiveSession(userId: string)`

Find the most recent un-ended session for a user.

#### `async getSessionById(tenantId: string, sessionId: string)`

#### `async getUserSessions(tenantId: string, userId: string)`

## apps/api/src/db/supabaseClient.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-supabaseclient-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `supabase() -> SupabaseClient`

Returns a lazily-initialised Supabase client.
Reads SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from the environment.

## apps/api/src/db/tenants.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-tenants-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async getTenantByPhoneNumberId(phoneNumberId: string) -> Promise<Tenant | null>`

#### `async getTenantWhatsAppToken(tenantId: string) -> Promise<string | null>`

#### `async getTenantPromptOverrides(tenantId: string) -> Promise<Record<string, string>>`

#### `async listTenants() -> Promise<Tenant[]>`

#### `async createTenant(payload: { name: string; phone_number_id?: string; webhook_verify_token?: string }) -> Promise<Tenant>`

#### `async getTenantById(tenantId: string) -> Promise<Tenant | null>`

#### `async updateTenant(tenantId: string, payload: { name?: string; phone_number_id?: string; webhook_verify_token?: string }) -> Promise<Tenant>`

#### `async setTenantWhatsAppToken(tenantId: string, token: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async upsertTenantPrompt(tenantId: string, key: string, content: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async deleteTenantPrompt(tenantId: string, key: string) -> Promise<void>`

## apps/api/src/db/users.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-users-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async upsertUser(whatsappNumber: string, displayName: string) -> Promise<{ user: UserRecord; created: boolean }>`

Find a user by their WhatsApp number, or create one if not present.
Returns the user record and a boolean indicating whether it was just created.

#### `async updateUserProgress(userId: string, journeyId: string | null, stepIndex: number) -> Promise<void>`

Update the current journey/step pointers on the user record.

#### `async markOnboarded(userId: string) -> Promise<void>`

Mark a user as onboarded (first time they interact).

#### `async claimMessage(whatsappMessageId: string) -> Promise<boolean>`

Atomically claim a Meta message ID for processing.
Returns true if this is the first time we've seen it, false if duplicate.

#### `async getUserByNumber(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<UserRecord | null>`

#### `async searchUsers(tenantId: string, query: string)`

#### `async getUserProgress(tenantId: string, userId: string)`

## apps/api/src/db/webMessages.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-webmessages-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async storeOutboundWebMessage(tenantId: string, userId: string, content: any) -> Promise<void>`

Store an outbound message for a web user.

#### `async pollAndClearWebMessages(tenantId: string, userId: string) -> Promise<WebMessageRecord[]>`

Poll and clear pending outbound messages for a user.

### Constants

- `WebMessageRecord`: `interface`

## apps/api/src/db/webhooks.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-db-webhooks-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async listWebhooks(tenantId: string) -> Promise<TenantWebhook[]>`

#### `async createWebhook(tenantId: string, webhook: { url: string; secret: string; events: string[] }) -> Promise<TenantWebhook>`

#### `async deleteWebhook(tenantId: string, id: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async getEnabledWebhooksForEvent(tenantId: string, event: string) -> Promise<TenantWebhook[]>`

## apps/api/src/engine/__tests__/contextBuilder.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-tests-contextbuilder-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/engine/__tests__/flowRouter.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-tests-flowrouter-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/engine/__tests__/outputParser.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-tests-outputparser-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/engine/__tests__/sessionManager.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-tests-sessionmanager-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/engine/__tests__/sessionStore.contract.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-tests-sessionstore-contract-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/engine/adapters.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-adapters-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `getAdapter(provider: 'whatsapp' | 'slack') -> IWhatsAppAdapter`

## apps/api/src/engine/contextBuilder.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-contextbuilder-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `trimHistory(history: ConversationTurn[]) -> ConversationTurn[]`

Trim the conversation history to a reasonable rolling window before sending
to the model. Keeps the most recent turns and drops older ones.

#### `transcript(history: ConversationTurn[]) -> string`

Build a readable transcript string (used in step-end summaries).

## apps/api/src/engine/flowRouter.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-flowrouter-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async handleInbound(msg: InboundMessage, tenantId: string, adapter: IWhatsAppAdapter) -> Promise<void>`

Public entry point — handle a single inbound message end-to-end.

## apps/api/src/engine/inMemorySessionStore.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-inmemorysessionstore-ts"></a>

### Classes

#### `InMemorySessionStore`

In-memory session store used in tests and local development.

##### Methods

###### `async get(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<Session | null>`

###### `async set(session: Session) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async delete(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async size() -> Promise<number>`

###### `getSync(whatsappNumber: string) -> Session | undefined`

Synchronous get — used internally by the legacy sessionManager shim.

###### `setSync(session: Session) -> void`

Synchronous set — used internally by the legacy sessionManager shim.

###### `deleteSync(whatsappNumber: string) -> void`

Synchronous delete — used internally by the legacy sessionManager shim.

###### `sizeSync() -> number`

Synchronous count — used by the health endpoint.


## apps/api/src/engine/outputParser.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-outputparser-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `parseAIResponse(raw: string) -> AIResponse`

Parse a raw Gemini text response into a validated AIResponse.
Returns a safe fallback if the response is missing or malformed (and logs the raw text).

## apps/api/src/engine/redisSessionStore.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-redissessionstore-ts"></a>

### Classes

#### `RedisSessionStore`

Upstash Redis session store.
Reads UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN from the environment.
TTL is managed by Redis — no sweeper needed.

##### Methods

###### `constructor()`

###### `async get(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<Session | null>`

###### `async set(session: Session) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async delete(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async size() -> Promise<number>`


## apps/api/src/engine/sessionManager.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-sessionmanager-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `configureSessionStore(s: ISessionStore) -> void`

#### `async getSession(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<Session | undefined>`

#### `async createSession(params: {
  tenantId: string;
  userId: string;
  whatsappNumber: string;
  provider?: 'whatsapp' | 'slack' | 'web';
  initialMode?: FlowState;
}) -> Promise<Session>`

#### `async updateSession(whatsappNumber: string, patch: Partial<Session>) -> Promise<Session>`

#### `async appendTurn(whatsappNumber: string, turn: ConversationTurn) -> Promise<Session>`

#### `async resetSession(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<Session | undefined>`

#### `async deleteSession(whatsappNumber: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async activeSessionCount() -> Promise<number>`

#### `startSessionSweeper(onExpire: ExpiryHandler) -> void`

#### `stopSessionSweeper() -> void`

### Constants

- `ExpiryHandler`: `type`

## apps/api/src/engine/sessionStore.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-engine-sessionstore-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/export/__tests__/scorm.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-export-tests-scorm-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/export/scorm.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-export-scorm-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async generateScormPackage(tenantId: string, journeyId: string) -> Promise<Buffer>`

Generates a SCORM 1.2 zip package for a journey.

## apps/api/src/index.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-index-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/middleware/auth.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-middleware-auth-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async requireAuth(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) -> Promise<void>`

Require a valid Supabase Auth JWT on the request.
Attaches req.user and req.tenantId on success; returns 401 on failure.

#### `requireRole(...roles: string[])`

Require the authenticated user to have one of the listed roles.
Must be used after requireAuth.

### Constants

- `AuthUser`: `interface`

## apps/api/src/middleware/learnerAuth.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-middleware-learnerauth-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async requireLearner(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) -> Promise<void>`

Require a valid Supabase Auth JWT and verify it belongs to a registered learner.
Attaches req.learner and req.tenantId on success; returns 401/403 on failure.
Also handles auto-linking of learner_id for existing user records matched by email.

### Constants

- `LearnerContext`: `interface`

## apps/api/src/notifications/email.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-notifications-email-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async sendEmail({ to, subject, html, resendApiKey }: SendEmailParams) -> Promise<void>`

Sends an email via Resend API using fetch.
Fire-and-forget: logs errors but never throws.

## apps/api/src/notifications/notify.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-notifications-notify-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async notifyJourneyComplete(tenantId: string, userId: string, journeyTitle: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async notifyLowScore(tenantId: string, userId: string, journeyTitle: string, score: number) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async notifyIdleUser(tenantId: string, userId: string, phone: string) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async sendListMessage(to: string, body: string, buttonLabel: string, sections: ListSection[], creds: SlackCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-tests-sender-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/whatsapp/__tests__/webAdapter.test.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-tests-webadapter-test-ts"></a>

## apps/api/src/whatsapp/parser.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-parser-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `parseWebhook(payload: MetaWebhookPayload) -> InboundMessage[]`

Extract normalised inbound messages from a Meta webhook payload.
Status updates and empty payloads return an empty array.

## apps/api/src/whatsapp/sender.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-sender-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `async sendMediaMessage(to: string, mediaType: 'image' | 'document' | 'audio' | 'video', mediaUrl: string, caption: string, creds: SenderCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async sendTextMessage(to: string, text: string, creds: SenderCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async sendButtonMessage(to: string, body: string, buttons: ButtonOption[], creds: SenderCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async sendListMessage(to: string, body: string, buttonLabel: string, sections: ListSection[], creds: SenderCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

#### `async markAsRead(messageId: string, creds: SenderCredentials) -> Promise<void>`

### Constants

- `SenderCredentials`: `interface`
- `WhatsAppAdapter`: `IWhatsAppAdapter`

## apps/api/src/whatsapp/webAdapter.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-webadapter-ts"></a>

### Classes

#### `WebAdapter`

##### Methods

###### `constructor(tenantId: string, userId: string)`

###### `async sendTextMessage(to: string, text: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendMediaMessage(to: string, mediaType: 'image' | 'document' | 'audio' | 'video', mediaUrl: string, caption: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendButtonMessage(to: string, body: string, buttons: ButtonOption[]) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendListMessage(to: string, body: string, buttonLabel: string, sections: ListSection[]) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async markAsRead(messageId: string) -> Promise<void>`


## apps/api/src/whatsapp/webhook.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-webhook-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `verifyWebhook(req: Request, res: Response) -> void`

GET /webhook/whatsapp — Meta hub challenge verification.

#### `verifySignature(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) -> void`

Express middleware — verifies the X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC header sent by Meta.
Must be mounted AFTER express.json({ verify: rawBodyCapture }) so req.rawBody is populated.
Rejects with 401 if the signature is missing or invalid.

#### `receiveWebhook(req: Request, res: Response) -> void`

POST /webhook/whatsapp — Meta inbound messages and status updates.

## apps/api/src/whatsapp/whatsappAdapter.ts
<a id="apps-api-src-whatsapp-whatsappadapter-ts"></a>

### Classes

#### `WhatsAppAdapter`

##### Methods

###### `constructor(creds: sender.SenderCredentials)`

###### `async sendTextMessage(to: string, text: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendMediaMessage(to: string, mediaType: 'image' | 'document' | 'audio' | 'video', mediaUrl: string, caption: string) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendButtonMessage(to: string, body: string, buttons: ButtonOption[]) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async sendListMessage(to: string, body: string, buttonLabel: string, sections: ListSection[]) -> Promise<void>`

###### `async markAsRead(messageId: string) -> Promise<void>`


## packages/shared/src/contracts/index.ts
<a id="packages-shared-src-contracts-index-ts"></a>

## packages/shared/src/contracts/sessionStore.contract.ts
<a id="packages-shared-src-contracts-sessionstore-contract-ts"></a>

### Functions

#### `sessionStoreContract(factory: () => ISessionStore) -> void`

Run this suite against any ISessionStore implementation to verify contract compliance.
Usage: sessionStoreContract(() => new MyStore())
